title: DataPoint
description: The atomic unit of verified intelligence. Every factual claim in the system is a DataPoint with full provenance. No claim may appear in a brief without a corresponding DataPoint.

fact_key.description: Stable identifier used to link facts across S3 → S4 → S5 stages (e.g. 'district_proficiency_ela_pct').

community_id.description: Parent community. Foreign key to community.schema.json

dimension.description: Which scoring dimension this datapoint feeds

claim.description: The specific factual claim this datapoint represents. Write as a complete, standalone sentence.
claim.example: Albuquerque Public Schools served 73,850 K-12 students in 2023-24.

value.description: Machine-readable version of the claim value, if numeric or categorical

value_unit.description: Unit of the value field if numeric

source_url.description: Direct URL to the source. Required for all classes except SELF_REPORTED and UNVERIFIED. If unavailable, set to null and explain in source_notes.

source_date.description: Publication or retrieval date of the source

source_notes.description: Any caveats about the source — e.g., lag in data, format notes, pending verification

confidence_rationale.description: Why this confidence level was assigned. Required when not HIGH.
confidence_rationale.example: Single source; could not cross-check with independent source.

verification_status.description: VERIFIED = confirmed by source_url. PROVISIONAL = plausible but not directly confirmed. DISPUTED = conflicting sources. NOT_FOUND = searched but no data available.

conflicting_sources.description: If DISPUTED, list the conflicting values and their sources

bias_flag.description: PRO_CHARTER | ANTI_CHARTER | NEUTRAL. Required when source_class is ADVOCACY.

extracted_by.description: Model or process that extracted this datapoint

stage.description: Pipeline stage that created this datapoint

in_main_analysis.description: Computed by s4_verification. True only if allows_in_main is true per sources.yaml AND confidence >= MODERATE.

needs_verification_reason.description: If in_main_analysis is false, explain why this was routed to needs_verification.

frl_compressed.description: Set on the frl_pct datapoint when FRL% >= 80. Marks the metric as top-band-compressed (present but saturated), distinct from a default-5 exclusion. Set by nces_fetcher.
